title: 10 medicinal preparations of Sambucus ebulus (dwarf elder)

preparations_list.preparation_desc: Sambucus ebulus teas is used to alleviate various health issues. The tea has been traditionally used to treat colds, flu, and fever by reducing inflammation and relieving congestion. Its anti-inflammatory properties also make it effective in soothing digestive issues such as constipation, diarrhea, and irritable bowel syndrome. Additionally, the tea has been known to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and even exhibit antibacterial properties, making it a natural remedy for various health concerns.

Sambucus ebulus tinctures is used to promote overall health and wellness. The tincture is often employed to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as bloating and cramps, as well as to soothe respiratory problems like coughs and bronchitis. Additionally, it has been traditionally used to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Its antiviral properties also make it a popular remedy for fighting off colds and flu.

Sambucus ebulus decoctions is used to treat a variety of health issues. The decoction has been traditionally used to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and soothe digestive problems such as diarrhea and constipation. It has also been shown to have antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin infections. Additionally, the decoction is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help protect against chronic diseases.

Sambucus ebulus capsules is used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns. The capsules are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. They have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Additionally, Sambucus ebulus capsules may help regulate blood sugar levels and support cardiovascular health.

Sambucus ebulus tablets is used to alleviate a range of health issues. The tablets have been traditionally used to treat digestive problems such as bloating and flatulence, as well as menstrual cramps and irritability in women. They are also believed to possess antibacterial properties, making them effective against infections such as urinary tract infections. Additionally, the tablets may help to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health.

Sambucus ebulus ointments is used to alleviate various health issues. It has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that make it effective in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds. The ointment can be applied topically to reduce swelling and pain, while its antiseptic properties help prevent infections. Additionally, Sambucus ebulus ointments have been used to treat respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma by reducing inflammation and congestion in the airways.

Sambucus ebulus creams is used to treat a variety of skin and hair issues. The cream has anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe itching and irritation caused by eczema, acne, and bug bites. It can also be used to improve scalp conditions such as dandruff and psoriasis. Additionally, the cream is believed to have antibacterial properties that aid in wound healing and reduce the appearance of scars.

Sambucus ebulus salves is used to alleviate a range of health issues. The salve has been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It has also been used to reduce fever, relieve pain and discomfort, and even help with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Additionally, the salve may be applied topically to soothe and calm irritated skin.

Sambucus ebulus poultices is used to treat a variety of health issues. The poultice is applied topically to reduce swelling and inflammation in cases of sprains, strains, and bruises. It's also effective in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and minor wounds. Additionally, the antiseptic properties of Sambucus ebulus help to prevent infection and promote healing. The poultice can be used on a daily basis for several days to achieve optimal results.

Sambucus ebulus syrups is used to treat a range of health issues. The syrup is effective in soothing digestive problems such as indigestion and bloating, while its anti-inflammatory properties help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and gout. Additionally, the syrup has been traditionally used to calm coughs and colds, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory issues.

intro: Sambucus ebulus has several medicinal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures. These preparations are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, such as diarrhea and dysentery, respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, and skin conditions like eczema and acne. Additionally, the plant's berries have been used in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and even cancer.
intro_desc: Sambucus ebulus has several medicinal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures. These preparations are useful for relieving fever, rheumatic pain, and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant's roots and leaves are used to make a tea that has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and as a laxative. Its tincture is also used to treat respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds.
